skills.work: Materialize the public dataset and audit its structure, quality, balance, duplicates, and leakage risk.
Build the frozen comparator and logistic-regression baseline, save metrics, and verify exact replay.
Calculate variability and justified uncertainty intervals and document their assumptions.
Review bias, leakage, generalization, claim boundaries, and the non-clinical scope.
Create and inspect four source-mapped PNG figures and matching SVG exports.
Review the scientific report in five passes without changing the approved scientific content.
Build the seven-slide deck, render every slide, inspect the output, and retain its source map.
